creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Sorry Chris I won't be able to fulfill this PR.  Can you address the following Makefile warning?

% portlint -ac
WARN: Makefile: how about using "${MASTER_SITE_GNOME}" with "MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=teams/art.gnome.org/themes/icon", instead of "https://download.gnome.org/teams/art.gnome.org/themes/icon/"?
